96     def parse_file(self, file_path: str) -> Optional[ParsedContent]:
97         full_path = self.content_path / file_path
98         
99         if not full_path.exists():
100             return None
101         
102         ext = full_path.suffix.lower()
103         
104         if ext == '.md':
105             return self._parse_markdown(full_path)
106         elif ext == '.ipynb':
